subject: Christian Religious Education
style: Uganda flag-inspired classroom infographic; exact SVG text overlay; no generated text inside raster image.
title: Christians and the Holy Spirit
labels: Who are our Heroes of Faith?
details: Dividing the scrapbook into three sections.
Illustrating the Creation story or Jesus’ service.
Identifying the Red Cross or UNICEF.
evidence_excerpts: Brainstorming session to recall "Heroes of Faith" from the three main topics: Biblical figures, African Ancestors, and World Religions/Organizations. The learner identifies and categorizes key figures and organizations studied throughout Term 1. Reviewing Topic 1: Biblical Heroes.; Reviewing Topic 2: Ancestors and Reconciliation.; Reviewing Topic 3: Global Organizations of Service.

Selecting sections for the scrapbook and preparing local materials for assembly. The learner plans the structure and design of a thematic scrapbook. Dividing the scrapbook into three sections.; Choosing titles for each page.; Preparing local materials (banana fibers, cards).

Creating content for the first two sections of the scrapbook: Biblical salvation and Traditional reconciliation. The learner illustrates and describes the roles of Biblical figures and African ancestors in the faith journey. Illustrating the Creation story or Jesus’ service.; Writing about an ancestor who promoted peace.; Highlighting the value of reconciliation.
